channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: A leftward lurch? What to know about the Democratic primaries in New York
item.description: Democratic socialist candidates push for an edge in US races that hinge on issues like Israel policy and inequality.

item.title: Messi breaks World Cup’s all-time scoring record with 17th goal vs Austria
item.description: Lionel Messi is tournament's all-time and current edition's leading goal scorer with 17 and four goals, respectively.

item.title: Lebanon discusses ‘de-confliction’ mechanism ahead of Israel talks
item.description: Mediators Qatar and Pakistan say plan seeks to ensure the end of military operations in Lebanon.

item.title: Qatar’s PM tells Al Jazeera progress made in US-Iran talks
item.description: Qatar's PM said US-Iran talks in Switzerland laid the groundwork for a final deal after 18 hours of discussions.

item.title: Kenyan court finds minister in contempt over US Ebola site
item.description: Health Minister Duale disobeyed an order to halt construction at the proposed facility for infected US nationals, court says.

item.title: Will a US-Iran deal transform the Iranian economy?
item.description: A US-Iran deal could unlock frozen assets, oil exports, and investment, reshaping Iran's economic future.

item.title: South African police tighten security as anti-migrant deadline approaches
item.description: Xenophobic protest groups have demanded that undocumented foreigners leave the country by June 30 .

item.title: Marco Rubio heads to Middle East to address Iran MoU, Hormuz
item.description: Rubio to visit UAE, Kuwait and Bahrain for talks on Iran and Hormuz priorities from June 23 to June 25.

item.title: LIVE: France vs Iraq – World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow the live build-up and team news coverage ahead of our text commentary stream of the Group I game in Philadelphia.

item.title: Canada’s inflation hits 29-month high amid heightened oil prices
item.description: Petrol prices lead the surge with a 33.2 percent price increase on an annual basis.

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Israeli attacks surge despite ceasefire efforts
item.description: Israeli attacks intensify across southern Lebanon despite ongoing diplomatic efforts.

item.title: US partially lifts Iran oil sanctions amid ‘encouraging’ talks
item.description: The move, expected under the MoU, comes as Vice President JD Vance says there's a 'good foundation' for a final deal.

item.title: Why Washington’s reflecting pool has gone from ‘US blue’ to algae green
item.description: Donald Trump, who spent $14m relining the iconic pool, claims it has been vandalised by 'radical left lunatics'.

item.title: Football, war and solidarity: Why Gaza fans turned to Spain this World Cup
item.description: Football fans in Gaza showed overwhelming support for Spain against Saudi Arabia during Sunday's World Cup clash.

item.title: Former US Federal Reserve Chairman Alan Greenspan dies at age 100
item.description: Greenspan presided over economic turbulence, including crises and booms, during his 18-year tenure as Fed chairman.

item.title: What the World Cup looks like from Gaza
item.description: Gaza's footballers train on broken pitches with no shoes. Why has FIFA's rebuilding plan gone nowhere?

item.title: Ukraine says it hit missile electronics plant in western Russia
item.description: Ukraine says facility a 'critical component' in defence production as local Russian authorities confirm attack.

item.title: Ex-Wimbledon champion Vondrousova banned for refusing drug test
item.description: Marketa Vondrousova, who won Wimbledon in 2023, was issued a four year suspension after she refused to submit a ⁠⁠sample.

item.title: Why has Keir Starmer resigned as UK prime minister, and who will take over?
item.description: The United Kingdom will have its seventh prime minister in a decade.

item.title: Qatar PM denies snubbing US vice president in viral video
item.description: Qatar's Prime Minister told Al Jazeera that reports of him snubbing the US vice president were unfounded.

item.title: Argentina vs Austria LIVE: World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow updates as Messi's Argentina play Austria in Group J, including the build-up, analysis and live text commentary.

item.title: China adds 10 US firms, including rare-earth miner, to export control list
item.description: Export ban follows move by Pentagon to blacklist major Chinese companies such as Alibaba and Baidu.

item.title: Pakistan issues nationwide alert over fears of heavy rains, floods
item.description: Warning comes as country braces for likely fourth consecutive year of punishing monsoon, expected to arrive this month.

item.title: Far-right de la Espriella elected Colombia president: What’s next?
item.description: Election results show Trump-endorsed millionaire Abelardo de la Espriella wins by razor-thin margin.

item.title: JD Vance touts progress on key issues in US-Iran negotiations
item.description: JD Vance touts progress on key issues in US-Iran negotiations.
